response.overview: After seven years of marriage, Amani and Shahidan have been blessed with a child, but their child has contracted a serious fever. While on the way to the hospital, Shahidan dies in an accident. Amani's friend Farah also dies in the accident with Shahidan. Only Maisarah, a child, survives the accident. Amani is shocked to discover that Farah was actually Shahidan's second wife and Maisarah is their child. Before her death, Farah managed to entrust Maisarah to Amani. Amani is deeply disappointed by Shahidan's betrayal and cannot accept Maisarah's presence.
response.title: Aku Tanpa Dia
